name: CI/CD
description: AI-powered Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery tools that automate build, test, and deployment pipelines with intelligent optimization.

name: Code Assistant
description: AI code assistants that help developers write, review, and debug code faster with intelligent suggestions and auto-completion.

description: AI-enhanced monitoring and observability tools that provide intelligent alerting, anomaly detection, and root cause analysis.

name: Testing
description: AI-driven testing tools that automatically generate, maintain, and optimize test suites for better software quality.

name: Security

name: AI Code Review

name: AIOps
